popularStory.headline: Marriage
popularStory.description: John Blair of Blair married Helen Ross ca.1502, daughter of 2nd Lord Ross, knight, and of Christian Edmonstone, who was a gr- gr- granddaughter of King Robert III of Scots.

zh.Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓
zh.Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Kingdom of Scotl: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾霍賀亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair於1502年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair26歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie20歲。他於1521年與Lady Helen De Ross在蘇格蘭雷福福爾霍賀亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年8月10日在蘇格蘭培爾享年68歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair于1502年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair26岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie20岁。他于1521年与Lady Helen De Ross在苏格兰雷福福爾霍賀亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年8月10日在苏格兰培爾享年68岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair was born in 1502, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair, was 26 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, was 20. He married Lady Helen De Ross in 1521, in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 August 1570, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair est né en 1502, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Helen De Ross en 1521, à Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 août 1570, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair 1502 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair 26 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie 20. Er hat 1521 in Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland Lady Helen De Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. August 1570 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair è nato il nel 1502 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Helen De Ross nel 1521, nel Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 agosto 1570, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blairが1502年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blairは26歳，母Lady Elizabeth Montgomerieは20歳であった。1521年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアハウクヘドでLady Helen De Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年8月10日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで68歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair(이)가 1502년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1521년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 호크헤드에서 Lady Helen De Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 8월 10일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair nasceu em 1502, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Helen De Ross em 1521, em Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1570, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair родился в 1502 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Helen De Ross в 1521 г. в местности ховхид, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 августа 1570 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 10th Lord of Blair nació en 1502, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Helen De Ross en 1521, en Hawkhead, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1570, en Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Perthshire, Scotland.
